user.title: HA GPS Tracker Exporter
user.description: Exposes device_tracker GPS coordinates on the Prometheus endpoint /api/gps_prometheus (requires a bearer token).

data_description.namespace: Prefix for every exported metric, e.g. "homeassistant" produces homeassistant_device_tracker_latitude_degrees.

error.invalid_namespace: Namespace must start with a letter, underscore or colon and contain only letters, numbers, underscores or colons.

abort.single_instance_allowed: This integration can only be configured once.

data_description.namespace: Prefix for every exported metric. Changes take effect on the next Prometheus scrape.

error.invalid_namespace: Namespace must start with a letter, underscore or colon and contain only letters, numbers, underscores or colons.
